surface.description: White card backgrounds with warm-toned borders

nav.description: Dark navigation bar and header areas

faction.description: Four faction colors: Wei (blue), Shu (green), Wu (red/orange), Qun (purple)

accent.description: Green for play/active states, amber/gold for badges and confirm buttons, blue for skill tags

text.description: Near-black for headings, medium gray for descriptions, white on dark backgrounds

divider.description: Warm light gray dividers and borders

sampledPixels.note: These are approximate sample points from the image canvas — exact values may vary by 1-2 hex digits due to JPEG compression artifacts
